# OAuth.TokenResponse.RefreshToken property

OPTIONAL. The issued refresh token, at the authorization server's discretion (§23.9, R-23.9-d). A client MUST NOT assume one is issued; `null` when none was.

```csharp
public string? RefreshToken { get; set; }
```
